[{"Name":"Soudabeh Ross","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIIYp8DL84uvWqKXndN3fyH2opy5vCgk_n6HxUZpeyBZF2ymQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Unique roofing has chosen the right name for their business. The business owner, Louis, is professional and very honest. He explains the whole process, the contract, and the warranty thoroughly before, during, and after the job is done. He takes pictures of all the stages of the job including, the removal, installation of the plywood, ice and water layers and the shingles and shares them with the property owner. [{"Name":"Saad Liaqat Ali","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjULSwkwtN5cKeFKsRC5mTF0czSUtI0FEJaApHZDiU9btKHHHFn4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Job: -
I used EVO roofing to replace my single car garage house in Pickering for complete shingles, soffits, fascia, Eva through, gutter and downpipes. I connected with them through Albert (647-679-8337). I discussed my expectation with him and texted the full list of verbal agreement.

Product: -
I been presented GAF Timberline Charcoal black HD shingles during initial project discussion. No deposit payment was made and the change one day due to actual rain.

Workday: -
Sawn (E) came to my house at 8:30 pm on Tuesday (scheduled time) and brought the same shingles as Albert presented to me before.

Work: -
5 personals were presented, and they started working right away. Yes, house surrounding become little messy, but Shawn affirmed me that it will be cleaned. Remove shingles and soffits, fascia, Eva through, gutter, pipes at same time

around 10:30 am they removed shingles from main roof and soffits, fascia, Eva through, gutter, pipes from full house.

around 1:30 pm they completely installed the full house shingles. I found one dip in shingles, I thought is a Plywood issue, but Shawn opened the shingles and showed me the plywood which was in good condition. but he levelled the shingles on my request.

around 2:00 pm took the lunch but otherwise they were working.

6:45 pm Soffits, fascia, Eva through, gutter and pipes was completely installed. While other guys picked the garbage, metal through magnetic cart and broom cleaned the whole area. Almost no debris left as they promised.

7:00 pm they gave me workmanship warranty and shingles registered warranty from Timberline. Took the money cash. I didn’t have full money, so they picked the remaining cash next day.

Yes, Except Shawn no worker speaks English (Doesn’t matter to me).

Yes, when they throw shingles, they don’t say anything, but they look for it (Which is good).

Favour: -
They put new shingles to my 8x8 shed for free (Installed on existing ones on my request.)

I’m happy with there work, (apparently) quality and completion time. I live on a ravine property and the falling branches and leaves can cause a lot of damage. I called and spoke to Ivan who was very helpful and pleasant. His father, the owner, came by a few hours later to check my roof.

Turns out the roof was in perfectly good shape after all these years, but some caulking around my chimney was in disrepair and that issue was causing a small leak. The owner caulked my chimney without me even asking and didn't charge me for the work. I've dealt with contractors in the past who would recommend work that wasn't necessary, but not in this case.

Highly recommend Gitson for quality work, honesty, great service, and for standing behind their roofing jobs. I have used Gitson before for repairs and decided to call them for a quote for a complete replacement. Spoke with Irene and she had Mr Liang, the owner come out same day to take a look. Gitson’s quote was very competitive compared to other quotes I got. Plus I know their work was second to none so it was easy choice to go with them.

They had 8 people showed up on the arranged date right at 8am and they got to work right away. I had them redo my entire roof plus also redo the flat roof above my garage. In addition they also redid all my eavestroughs and put in proper ventilation on my roof. I had bought some new bathroom fans that I wanted installed to properly vent outside through the roof. This was all arranged and installed for a nominal price. All in all I was extremely satisfied with the work. They took care of the work site in great detail. Short version: multiple leaks and they said it is our roof's fault because the shingles do not overhang by 2 inches so they can't fix it. Fascia is wavy so they "fixed" it by pounding it with screws.
Disappointed because we hired them to fix the leak. But there are more leaks now than before just in different spots and our fascia looks is wavier than the neighbour's 50 year old fascia.

We hired this company because our gutters were leaking and we took advantage of that to redo the soffits and fascia as well to make sure we would have no issues.
Unfortunately, the quality of the work is poor. (see pictures).

1. The big one is that water leaks between the gutters and the soffits in multiple locations (see pictures that show a gap). Their response is that they (a roofing company) can't fix it because the shingles don't overhang by 2 inches.
2. The attention to details was also poor.
a. They used a mix of colour matching and non colour matching screws.
b. The soffits are not flat/parallel to the ground (perpendicular to the wall) but slightly angled in some locations. (see picture).
c. The fascia is wavy. When we asked them to fix it someone showed up and started adding screw after screw after screw. They wouldn't talk to us so we had to tell them to stop. (see picture). Bottom line, our fascia is still wavier than our neighbour's 50 year old fascia.
3. in one of the pictures you will notice how the soffit trim (the track) is poorly put together, the trims don't seamlessly align, there are gaps and there's a few spots that are damaged but they installed it anyways. (see picture)
4. Perhaps unrelated, but the workers "didn't speak English" so when we would try to talk to them they just would mostly just smile and keep working. I would have been as happy as them if the work had been done properly but not when it's an excuse to ignore our concerns.

Summary: make sure you verify the work before you give them your money. Realistically, can you verify a roof? We purchased a beautiful, high-quality front door expecting professional service to match. Unfortunately, the installation — done by their “best” contractor, K — has been an ongoing source of stress and frustration.

From day one, the door was misaligned and difficult to operate. It jammed into the casing, causing scratches, and had to be reinstalled. Even after that, the door wouldn’t latch, and K’s only advice was to “slam it harder.” For the past eight months, we’ve had to pull the door tight every time just to lock it with the deadbolt — a problem that was never resolved despite being told to “wait a few weeks for weathering.”

We’ve had to ask them to come back three separate times, and none of the issues were ever fully fixed. This has been especially frustrating because it’s our front door — the one we use multiple times a day and expect to work reliably.

Other issues include:
- Staple holes left in the casing and trim
- Sloppy filler work done with fingers, leaving a mess we had to clean up ourselves
- A visible gap in the doorway that was only addressed with a ¼ round trim after we pointed it out
- no caulking done around the door casing, leaving large gaps that we filled on our own

Basic quality control and pride in workmanship were completely missing. If we hadn’t been so persistent, many of these problems would have been left unresolved.

Edmunds Home Improvement may offer beautiful products, but if this is the level of installation service they stand behind, I strongly advise others to look elsewhere. We regret choosing them and hope this review helps others avoid the same experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUyIlZT2HDyHKkSdPEzyaRvXG6M3COBNlnsNeff4xrs76lu4KuX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Steve, Tyler, Kay and the team offered such great customer service! The crew showed up late the following Monday and was extremely sloppy with their work. No surprise, 3 months later, I started experiencing some leaks through the side of the skylights. I called Anil right away to explain the issue and he deferred me to Vince (the owner). Sadly, after several more follow-ups, both individuals started to ignore my calls and would not honour the 10 year warranty that they had promised via our contract.

Given that this is a fairly straightforward job, I did not expect to experience any water damage, let alone within the first 3 months of installation. Due to their negligence, I ended up paying more than double by bringing in another roofer to re-install the skylights. In addition, I needed to hire a general contractor to fix the water damage that seeped through the drywall, re-paint the wall and replace a portion of my brand new hardwood floors.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Sheik Sahib","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIwTulKGcWIxi2RDoYF5gap3666L2R1oTOVkOv4gR-IhGSqZQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Peter and his crew replaced our roof a week ago.  It rained quite a bit for the past 24 hours.  So far absolutely no leaks!  Peter and his crew are excellent.

This is our second partnership with City roofing and aluminum.  After 19+ years the old roof needed replacement.  Delivery of the shingles was scheduled 2 days before installation.

The crew arrived at 8:00 AM and promptly got to work.  Our deck, windows and plants were covered to prevent damage.  The old roof was quickly dismantled and the new shingles were installed over new ice sheathing as per our arrangement.

Once the installation was complete, all debris was removed and hauled away.  Peter personally inspected the roof joints and made required adjustments. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"christine giles","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKjWDlYnj9euMOIjy8pQxJcCYmiBVw49I9h1Ty3QAha9L4v2A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Conrad is a phony non professional & non responsive person. He is willing to come out right away and do work, collect his money, But never follows thru with what comes out of his mouth. He says he will send a receipt and warranty to you. Yet its been a week and still waiting. We called him to have him come out and look at the deficiency of the job, He has promised to come out three times, and has not shown up. Excuses after Excuses/ Lies.
STAY AWAY FROM THIS COMPANY....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID6-8WAwgE&fid=0x0:0x839732480cb5d163"],"When":"2021-10-12"},{"Name":"Rohan Frankie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCZRhaqWs5yMusYllFHMQKdJIJ5SGVQXcpIVPgIeCgaPGcFPpoHg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't say enough about Conrad and Markham Roofing. They came and ripped off my old shingles, cleaned up everything and did an awesome job on my roof.  Job was done on time and the roof looks spectacular.
My only comment would be about the newer Roof Louvre Vents that were installed. They are $250 each with installation and they really weren't mentioned until my roof was off and then I was made aware that I needed these. I did have condensation on one side of my roof, so I ended up getting 4 of the newer taller Louvre Vents. It is what it is.
